took a walk yesterday in the park instead. felt the cool evening breeze, watched the kids enjoy their playtime. felt rejuvenated and less focused on disappointments. life has so much more to offer than a single story, huh? 🍃💪

had the grossest meal last night but super worth it. would guys risk food poisoning for an experience like that?
oh man, I know the feeling! It was epic but totally wouldn't risk it again. Those crazy cravings are the best. 💥🍽️🤔

so true! those jalapeño biscuits hit just right. sometimes that heat mixed with something sweet does the whole flavor profile up a notch. next time, i’ll have to try the chorizo版本翻译
